steps.title: Set up
steps.content: The pool is 21 ft by 11 ft. A concrete path $x$ ft wide surrounds it on all sides, so the outer rectangle is $(21 + 2x)$ ft by $(11 + 2x)$ ft. The path area equals the outer area minus the pool area: $(21 + 2x)(11 + 2x) - 231 = 144$.

steps.title: Solve
steps.content: $(21 + 2x)(11 + 2x) = 375$. Expand: $231 + 42x + 22x + 4x^2 = 375$, so $4x^2 + 64x - 144 = 0$, which simplifies to $x^2 + 16x - 36 = 0$. Factor: $(x + 18)(x - 2) = 0$, giving $x = 2$ or $x = -18$. Since $x$ must be positive, $x = 2$.
